tasks.name: Create a weekly subscription for the cheapest 5-gallon spring water under $15
tasks.description: Filter the catalog to 5-gallon spring water under $15, sort by price, select the cheapest option, configure a weekly subscription for 2 bottles delivered on Mondays, and add this subscription to the cart.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the "Shop Water" option in the main navigation menu.
In the filters sidebar, select "5 Gallon" under the Size filter.
Under the Type filter, select "Spring Water".
In the price filter, set the maximum price to "$15".
Open the sort dropdown above the product list and select "Price: Low to High".
Click on the first product card in the sorted results list (the cheapest 5-gallon spring water).
On the product detail page, select the "Subscription" purchase option instead of one-time purchase.
In the subscription settings, choose the delivery frequency "Every week", select Monday as the delivery day, and set the quantity field to "2" bottles.
Click the "Add Subscription to Cart" button to add this weekly subscription to the cart.

tasks.name: Order 3 different sparkling water case sizes under $12 each in a single one-time order
tasks.description: Use filters to find sparkling water cases under $12, and add one 500 ml case, one 1 L case, and one 5 L case to the cart so you end up with exactly 3 different sparkling cases in a one-time order.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the "Shop Water" link in the main navigation.
In the filters sidebar, check the "Sparkling" option under the Type filter.
In the price filter, set the maximum price to "$12" per case.
Scroll through the results and click the first product labeled as a case of "500 ml" bottles.
On the product page, keep the quantity as "1" and click the "Add to Cart" button.
Use the breadcrumb navigation or back link to return to the sparkling water product list, then click the first product labeled as a case of "1 L" bottles that is priced under $12.
On that product page, keep the quantity as "1" and click the "Add to Cart" button.

Return again to the sparkling water list, click the first product labeled as a case of "5 L" bottles under $12, and on its product page set quantity to "1" and click "Add to Cart" to complete the set of 3 different cases.

tasks.name: Apply the best one-time order promo code to a purchase of 3 cases of still water
tasks.description: Find the highest percentage promo code for one-time orders on the deals page, copy it, then add 3 cases of still water (1 L) to the cart and apply that promo code in the cart.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the "Deals & Promo Codes" link in the header or footer navigation.
On the deals page, identify the promotion with the highest percentage discount that explicitly applies to "one-time orders" and click its promo card.
On the promotion detail panel, click the "Copy Code" or "Copy Promo Code" button to copy the discount code.
Click the site logo to return to the homepage.
In the header search bar, type "still water 1L case" and press Enter to search.
From the search results, click the first product that is a case of still (non-sparkling) 1 L bottles.
On the product page, set the quantity field to "3" and click the "Add to Cart" button.
Click the cart icon in the header to open the cart, then in the "Promo Code" input field paste or type the copied code and click the "Apply" button.

tasks.name: Change an existing subscription from weekly to every 2 weeks while keeping quantity at 3
tasks.description: Open the subscription management area, select the first active subscription, update its delivery frequency from every week to every 2 weeks, ensure the quantity is set to 3, set deliveries to Wednesdays, and save the changes.
steps: From any page on the site, click the "My Account" link in the header.
In the account navigation menu, click on "My Subscriptions".
In the subscriptions list, locate the first active subscription and click its "Manage" or "Edit" button.
In the delivery frequency dropdown, change the selection from "Every week" to "Every 2 weeks".
In the quantity field for this subscription, type "3" to set the number of bottles to three if it is not already.
In the delivery day selector, choose "Wednesday" as the delivery day.
Scroll down and click the "Save Changes" button to update the subscription settings.
Click the "Back to Subscriptions" or similar link to return to the list of subscriptions.

tasks.name: Add a new delivery address and reschedule the next delivery to that address on a specific date and time window
tasks.description: Create a new address (123 Oak Street, Springfield, ZIP 12345), then reschedule the earliest upcoming delivery to use this new address on the 15th of next month between 3:00 PM and 6:00 PM.
steps: From any page, click the "My Account" link in the site header.
In the account menu, click "Addresses".
On the addresses page, click the "Add New Address" button.
In the address form, enter the name "Home", street "123 Oak Street", city "Springfield", state "CA", and ZIP code "12345".
Click the "Save Address" button to store this new address.
In the account sidebar or navigation, click "Upcoming Deliveries".
In the list of upcoming deliveries, click the "Reschedule" button for the first (earliest) upcoming delivery.

In the reschedule form, select the newly added "123 Oak Street" address from the address dropdown, pick the 15th of next month in the date picker, choose the "3:00 PM - 6:00 PM" time window, and click the "Confirm Delivery Schedule" button.

tasks.name: Add two eco-friendly water options with high ratings within a specific price range
tasks.description: Filter for eco-friendly products with ratings of at least 4.5 stars and prices between $5 and $25, then add one recycled-packaging bottled case and one refillable 5-gallon jug that match these filters to the cart.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the "Shop Water" option in the main navigation menu.
In the filters sidebar, check the box for "Eco-friendly / BPA-free" or similar eco-friendly tag.
Set the rating filter to show only products with "4.5 stars & up".
Set the price range filter with a minimum price of "$5" and a maximum price of "$25".
Within the category or filter for "Bottled cases", click the first product whose title or badge indicates "Recycled packaging" and on its product page set quantity to "1" and click "Add to Cart".
Return to the filtered product list, switch the category or filter to "Refillable jugs", and click the first product labeled as a "5 Gallon" jug that appears.
On that 5-gallon jug product page, set quantity to "1" and click the "Add to Cart" button to add it as the second eco-friendly item.

tasks.name: Use the Help Center to find the minimum order amount and adjust the cart to meet a $30 minimum
tasks.description: Add one product to the cart, open the Help Center to find the minimum order article, then ensure the cart meets a $30 minimum by increasing the quantity of the product to 3 and updating the cart.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the "Shop Water" link and, without applying any filters, click the first product in the list and add quantity "1" to the cart using the "Add to Cart" button.
Scroll to the footer and click the "Help" or "Support" link to open the Help Center.
In the Help Center search bar, type "minimum order amount" and press Enter.
From the search results, click the article titled "What is the minimum order amount?" which explains that orders must be at least $30.
Click the site logo to return to the main site, then click the cart icon in the header to open the cart.
In the cart view, change the quantity of the existing product to "3" so that the cart subtotal is at least $30.
Click the "Update Cart" or equivalent button to apply the new quantity and subtotal.

tasks.name: Rent an affordable water dispenser and add 4 matching 5-gallon bottles for delivery within 7 days
tasks.description: Select a dispenser rental plan costing no more than $20 per month, add it to the cart for 1 month, then add 4 still 5-gallon water bottles and schedule the combined order for the earliest standard delivery date within the next 7 days.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the "Dispensers & Coolers" option in the main navigation.
On the dispensers page, use the filter to show only "Rental" products.
In the price filter for rentals, set the maximum monthly rental price to "$20" and, if available, sort the list by "Price: Low to High".
Click the first dispenser rental product in the filtered list to open its detail page.
On the dispenser product page, select a rental duration of "1 month" and click the "Add Rental to Cart" button.
Use the navigation to go to "Shop Water", then in the filters sidebar select Size "5 Gallon" and Type "Still".
From the filtered 5-gallon still water list, click the first product, set the quantity to "4" on the product page, and click "Add to Cart".
Click the cart icon in the header and then click the "Checkout" button.
On the delivery step of checkout, select the earliest available date within the next 7 calendar days in the date picker and choose the "Standard delivery" option before proceeding.

entities.name: Product

fields.name: category_id
fields.description: Matches categoryId values used in URLs, e.g., products.html?categoryId=water

fields.name: water_type
fields.description: Type of water; null/omitted for dispenser-only products

fields.name: size_filter_key
fields.description: Normalized size used for filters like 5 Gallon, 500 ml, etc.

fields.name: size_label
fields.description: Display size label such as '5 Gallon' or '1 L'

fields.name: volume_liters
fields.description: Volume per bottle/jug in liters

fields.name: is_case
fields.description: True if product is a case of multiple bottles

fields.name: case_bottle_count
fields.description: Number of bottles in a case, for case products

fields.name: case_bottle_volume_liters
fields.description: Volume per bottle in a case

fields.name: packaging_category
fields.description: Used for filters such as 'Bottled cases' and 'Refillable jugs'

fields.name: price
fields.description: Base price per purchasable unit (case/jug or dispenser sale)

fields.name: currency
fields.description: ISO currency code, e.g., 'USD'

fields.name: rating
fields.description: Average star rating, e.g., 4.7

fields.name: rating_count
fields.description: Number of ratings

fields.name: tags
fields.description: Free-form tags like 'eco-friendly', 'recycled packaging'

fields.name: badges
fields.description: Marketing badges shown on product cards

fields.name: is_rental_product
fields.description: True for dispenser rental products

fields.name: rental_price_per_month
fields.description: Monthly rental price for rental products

fields.name: allowed_rental_durations
fields.description: Array of allowed rental duration identifiers such as '1_month', '3_months'

fields.name: allowed_subscription_frequencies
fields.description: Array of allowed subscription frequency identifiers such as 'every_week', 'every_2_weeks'

entities.description: Water and dispenser products available for one-time purchase, subscription, or rental

entities.name: Cart

fields.name: items
fields.description: Array of CartItem IDs or embedded cart item objects

entities.description: Shopping cart for the single user, holding one-time items, subscriptions, and rentals

entities.name: CartItem

fields.name: item_type
fields.description: Determines if the item is a one-time purchase, a subscription configuration, or a rental

fields.name: unit_price
fields.description: Effective unit price at time of adding to cart

entities.description: Individual line items within the cart, including configuration for subscriptions and rentals

entities.name: Subscription

fields.name: quantity
fields.description: Number of bottles/jugs per delivery

fields.name: address_id
fields.description: Delivery address used for this subscription

entities.description: Recurring water delivery subscriptions that can be managed in My Subscriptions

entities.name: Address

fields.name: label
fields.description: User-friendly label like 'Home' or 'Office'

entities.description: Saved delivery addresses used in checkout, subscriptions, and rescheduling deliveries

entities.name: Delivery

fields.name: scheduled_date
fields.description: Date of the delivery (time separated via time_window)

fields.name: time_window
fields.description: Delivery time slot; '15_00_18_00' corresponds to '3:00 PM - 6:00 PM'

fields.name: source_type
fields.description: Whether this delivery was created from a one-time order or a subscription schedule

fields.name: source_id
fields.description: ID of the originating Order or Subscription

fields.name: items_summary
fields.description: Array of human-readable item summaries for display in Upcoming Deliveries

entities.description: Upcoming and past deliveries, used for the Upcoming Deliveries view and rescheduling

entities.name: Order
entities.description: Orders created at checkout, including one-time items, subscription creations, and rental agreements

entities.name: OrderItem

fields.name: subscription_id
fields.description: Linked subscription if this line creates or renews one

entities.description: Line items for orders, including associated subscription or rental metadata

entities.name: Promo

fields.name: code
fields.description: Promo code string users copy and apply

fields.name: short_label
fields.description: Label shown on deal cards

fields.name: discount_value
fields.description: Percentage (e.g., 15 for 15%) or fixed amount depending on type

fields.name: applicable_order_type
fields.description: Used to filter deals for one-time orders vs subscriptions on the deals page

fields.name: minimum_order_amount
fields.description: Minimum cart/order total to apply this promo

fields.name: is_stackable
fields.description: Whether this promo can be combined with other promos

entities.description: Deals & promo codes shown on the Deals page and applicable in the cart/checkout

entities.name: HelpArticle

fields.name: slug
fields.description: URL-friendly identifier, e.g., 'minimum-order-amount'

fields.name: body
fields.description: Full HTML or markdown content of the help article

fields.name: category
fields.description: High-level category like 'orders', 'billing', 'delivery'

entities.description: Help center and FAQ articles, including the minimum order amount article

entities.name: SiteSettings

fields.name: minimum_order_amount
fields.description: Global minimum order amount, e.g., 30

fields.name: currency
fields.description: Default currency code, e.g., 'USD'

fields.name: standard_delivery_time_windows
fields.description: Array of allowed delivery time window identifiers such as '09_00_12_00', '15_00_18_00'

fields.name: max_delivery_schedule_days_ahead
fields.description: Maximum number of days ahead a delivery can be scheduled

entities.description: Global configuration such as minimum order amount and default delivery options
